title: Install plannotator plugin for dark factory review steps
description: Install and configure the plannotator Claude Code plugin so that dark factory sessions automatically open plans in the browser when they reach human review checkpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Plannotator plugin is installed and available to Claude Code sessions
Dark factory Claude runs have plannotator available in their environment
When a dark factory session reaches a human review step (e.g. plan review, devil's advocate), it triggers the plannotator UI to open in the browser
The review UI shows the plan/output that needs human approval
Works with the existing dark factory session naming convention and workflow
Documented in CLAUDE.md or relevant config so future sessions pick it up automatically
